summary: Completed comprehensive testing of movie recommender system with new features. Backend APIs working perfectly (87/87 tests passed). Frontend functionality excellent with all major features working including multi-language support, watchlist, streaming providers, and AI mood matcher.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoint with updated URL
All home categories (trending, popular, top_rated, now_playing, upcoming)
Search functionality with multiple query types
Movie details with complete data structure
Multi-language support (8 languages: EN, HI, ES, FR, KO, JA, AR, DE)
Watchlist CRUD operations (add, get, check, delete)
Watch providers endpoint with streaming platform data
Trending by region for multiple regions (US, IN, KR, JP, GB)
Rating system (submit and retrieve)
Review system (submit and display)
All recommendation engines (TF-IDF, collaborative, genre)
AI Mood Matcher backend API and frontend integration
Statistics endpoint
Frontend home page with hero section and movie cards
Language switcher in navbar - EN to Hindi (HI) text change
Language switcher - Hindi to Korean (KO) text change
Watchlist link navigation to /watchlist page
Movie detail page (/movie/27205) with poster, title, overview
Where to Watch section with 19 streaming providers and platform logos
Region switching in Where to Watch (US, IN, GB buttons)
Watchlist button on movie detail page (add/remove bookmark)
Review form submission with name and content
Mood Matcher page loading and AI response with 6 movie recommendations
Search page functionality with genre filters
Trending by Region section - India and Korea button clicks
Watchlist page empty state display in Korean language
